text: Python is a programming language used for web development, data science, and automation.
Machine learning models require training data and validation sets to avoid overfitting.
RAG stands for Retrieval-Augmented Generation; it combines search with large language models.
Embeddings are vector representations of text used for semantic search and similarity.
Recall at K measures whether relevant documents appear in the top K results.
Qdrant is a vector database optimized for similarity search and filtering.
Evaluation of retrieval systems often uses golden sets of queries and expected documents.
Regression testing ensures that changes do not degrade existing performance metrics.
